attributes.action: Stop the ban on trail hunting
attributes.additional_details: We believe trail hunting is a way of life and it generates so many jobs and helps rural communities and businesses. We therefore think that banning it will be a disaster.
attributes.background: Stop the plan to ban trail hunting!
